kept_spans: Normally hate camo shit, but this gets an exception.
Thank God these shorts are a hundred percent cotton because I didn't even look when I bought them. They were just so sick.
Even though it was kind of an impulsive purchase because these were super affordable, these are totally worth it and let me show you why.
They got a super nice baggy fit that sit right below the knee.
And as a skater, scooter rider, I love that these have deep pockets so I can go to the skate park and my phone will not fall out.
And they fit perfectly true to size even without a belt.
And because they were under fifty bucks, these are honestly the best shorts I've ever gotten.

So if the cart is still there, the sale is still happening, and if your size is still in stock, I would totally recommend picking these up because they're super easy to style and honestly so comfortable to wear.
Making these honestly some of the best jorts to pick up for the summertime coming up.
notes: Removed 'They got a perfect' as a false start before the speaker restarts with 'They got a super nice baggy fit'. Removed 'like,' as a filler before 'under fifty bucks'. Removed 'literally' as meaningless intensifier in 'honestly literally the best shorts'.
